subcodes.first_line: All the world awaited the Days of God, inasmuch as the Truth, exalted be His glory, had promised in His Books, Psalms and Sacred Scriptures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم منتظر ایام الله بودند چه که حق جل جلاله در کتب و زبر و صحف خود وعده
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
